Dress to Celebrate

Your Wardrobe Guide

Haldi Ceremony

21 NOVEMBER 2026

Embrace the vibrant spirit of the haldi ceremony with cheerful yellows, bright oranges, and sunny marigold tones. Think light fabrics, playful prints, and outfits you don't mind getting a little golden!

Pro tip: Avoid white and light colours you'd like to keep clean — turmeric stains beautifully but permanently!

What to Wear

WomenKurta sets, anarkalis or lehengas in yellow, mustard or orange. Floral prints are very welcome!
MenYellow or white kurta-pyjama, nehru jacket in mustard or saffron tones.
JewelleryFloral jewellery, marigold accessories, light gold pieces — keep it fun and festive.
FootwearJuttis, kolhapuris or comfortable flats — you'll be standing and dancing!

Engagement Evening

20 NOVEMBER 2026 · 6 PM

An elegant evening affair calls for your best cocktail and semi-formal Indian fusion looks. Think rich jewel tones, glamorous silhouettes and statement pieces. Dress to celebrate love in style.

Dress code: Smart Festive / Cocktail

What to Wear

WomenCocktail gowns, sharara sets, fusion lehengas or sarees in rich jewel tones. Embellishments and embroidery are encouraged!
MenBandhgala suits, sherwanis or formal Indo-western in navy, charcoal, deep green or maroon.
JewelleryStatement pieces — chandelier earrings, bold necklaces, elegant watches and cufflinks.
FootwearHeels, embellished sandals or formal shoes. This is your glamour night!

Wedding Ceremony

21 NOVEMBER 2026

The grandest evening of them all! Adorn yourself in the richness of traditional Indian elegance — deep reds, royal golds, lush pinks and regal blues. This is a celebration of a lifetime.

Dress code: Traditional / Grand Festive

What to Wear

WomenGrand lehengas, heavy sarees or anarkalis in red, pink, gold, royal blue or maroon. The more embroidery and embellishment the better!
MenSherwani, achkan or Indo-western in ivory, gold, maroon or cream with rich embroidery.
JewelleryGo all out — polki, kundan, temple jewellery, jadau, maang tikka for women. Classic pieces for men.
FootwearEmbellished heels, mojaris, juttis with mirror work or zardosi detailing.

Where the Magic Happens

The Venue

Cherish Ballrooms

VASANT KUNJ · NEW DELHI

A stunning event space in the heart of Vasant Kunj, Cherish Ballrooms sets the perfect stage for an Indian wedding celebration. The Emerald Hall hosts all three functions — intimate enough for warmth, grand enough for every dream.

Emerald Hall Vasant Kunj New Delhi 3 Functions
🌼

01 · The Beginning

Haldi

21 NOVEMBER 2026 · EMERALD HALL

The haldi ceremony marks the start of the wedding festivities — a joyful, sun-drenched ritual where turmeric paste is applied to the bride and groom, blessing them with radiance and prosperity for their new journey together.

Come drenched in yellow, armed with dance moves, and ready for laughter, love and lots of golden moments.

📅
Date
21 November 2026
📍
Venue
Emerald Hall, Cherish Ballrooms, Vasant Kunj
👗
Dress Code
Yellow, Mustard & Orange — wear what you love!
✨
Vibe
Joyful, Festive, Earthy & Full of Colour
💍

02 · The Promise

Engagement

20 NOVEMBER 2026 · 6 PM · EMERALD HALL

An elegant evening where two families come together to witness the beautiful promise Arun and Sanya make to each other. Expect glittering décor, heartfelt moments, and a night full of joy and dancing.

Dress in your finest — this is an evening to remember for a lifetime.

03 · The Forever

The Wedding

21 NOVEMBER 2026 · EMERALD HALL

The grandest celebration of all — the sacred union of Arun and Sanya. Surrounded by the warmth of family and the light of a thousand flowers, they take their vows and begin their forever.

Come dressed in all your glory to witness and celebrate this most beautiful of ceremonies.
